title: elaeocarpus quadratus
intro: Elaeocarpus quadratus, also known as the Blue Marble Tree or Australian Blue Quandong, is a plant species native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Elaeocarpus quadratus can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and it is also used as a food source, with its fruit being edible and rich in vitamins and minerals.
